name: Hendrick's Gin
tasteNose: Floral and sweet — fresh rose, cucumber, and delicate citrus blossom.
tastePalate: Creamy and smooth with cucumber at the fore, supported by gentle citrus zest and floral botanicals.
tasteFinish: Dry, medium-long, with lingering juniper and rose.

name: Tanqueray London Dry Gin
tasteNose: Assertive juniper, fresh citrus peel, and herbal coriander.
tastePalate: Bold and clean — juniper-forward with citrus brightness and a touch of spice.
tasteFinish: Clean and dry, with lasting juniper and a hint of spice.

name: Monkey 47 Schwarzwald Dry Gin
tasteNose: Intensely complex — pine resin, floral meadow herbs, citrus, and dark berries.
tastePalate: Extraordinarily layered: spice, berry, citrus, botanical complexity building in waves.
tasteFinish: Long, warming, resinous with lingering floral and spice notes.

name: The Botanist Islay Dry Gin
tasteNose: Delicate floral with wild herb meadow character, light citrus, and heather.
tastePalate: Gentle and aromatic — complex wildflower botanicals, light citrus, and creamy texture.
tasteFinish: Soft and lingering with herb and floral notes.

name: Bombay Sapphire
tasteNose: Light and fresh — citrus zest, juniper, and faint floral notes.
tastePalate: Smooth and versatile with citrus, light juniper, and gentle spice.

name: Roku Gin
tasteNose: Delicate sakura blossom, yuzu citrus, and fresh green tea.
tastePalate: Elegant and refined — yuzu, green tea, floral sakura, and gentle spice.
tasteFinish: Clean and precise with lingering yuzu and tea.

name: Tanqueray No. Ten
tasteNose: Vibrant fresh citrus — grapefruit, lime, and orange blossom.
tastePalate: Full-bodied citrus with chamomile, gentle juniper, and a creamy texture.
tasteFinish: Long, clean citrus finish with soft floral notes.

name: Beefeater London Dry Gin
tasteNose: Classic juniper, citrus peel, and fresh herbs.
tastePalate: Bold juniper character with citrus, a touch of earthiness, and clean spice.
tasteFinish: Dry and medium-long with juniper and citrus.

name: Aviation American Gin
tasteNose: Lavender and floral notes lead with light citrus and soft spice.
tastePalate: Soft and approachable — floral, slightly sweet with cardamom and lavender.
tasteFinish: Smooth and medium, with lavender and a touch of anise.

name: Gin Mare
tasteNose: Mediterranean character — savoury olive, thyme, rosemary, and citrus.
tastePalate: Distinctly savoury with fresh herbs, briny olive, citrus, and warming spice.
tasteFinish: Dry and herbal with lingering olive and rosemary.

name: Gordon's Special London Dry Gin
tasteNose: Fresh juniper and lemon zest — clean and approachable.
tastePalate: Light and easy-drinking with juniper, citrus, and mild spice.

name: Malfy Gin Con Limone
tasteNose: Intensely citrusy — Amalfi lemon zest and fresh juniper.
tastePalate: Bright and zesty lemon with creamy texture, subtle juniper, and gentle spice.
tasteFinish: Refreshing lemon finish with soft juniper backbone.

name: Isle of Harris Gin
tasteNose: Ocean character — sea air, citrus, juniper, and subtle seaweed.
tastePalate: Marine freshness with citrus, gentle kelp, warming spice, and herbal depth.
tasteFinish: Saline, clean, and lingering with citrus and sea minerality.

name: Cotswolds Dry Gin
tasteNose: Fresh and floral — lavender, grapefruit, and gentle juniper.
tastePalate: Bright grapefruit and citrus with floral lavender and a peppery kick.
tasteFinish: Medium, dry, with lasting pepper and citrus.

name: Sipsmith London Dry Gin
tasteNose: Rich juniper, fresh citrus peel, and warm spice.
tastePalate: Classic and balanced — juniper-led with citrus, almond, and gentle spice.
tasteFinish: Dry, elegant, medium-long with juniper and orange.
